description: Restrict anonymous (unauthenticated) users to only viewing posts and comments. All write operations (create, edit, delete posts/comments/reactions) require authentication.

tasks.task:
Add authentication guards to all write endpoints in the backend:

1. In `src/blog/blog.controller.ts`:
   - Add `@UseGuards(AuthGuard)` decorator to the `@Post()` create method
   - Add `@UseGuards(AuthGuard)` decorator to the `@Patch(':id')` update method
   - The `@Delete(':id')` already has manual token validation, but refactor to use `@UseGuards(AuthGuard)` for consistency
   - Import UseGuards from @nestjs/common and AuthGuard from '../auth/auth.guard'

2. In `src/comments/comments.controller.ts`:
   - Add `@UseGuards(AuthGuard)` decorator to `@Post('posts/:postId/comments')` create method
   - Add `@UseGuards(AuthGuard)` decorator to `@Delete('comments/:id')` delete method
   - Add `@UseGuards(AuthGuard)` decorator to `@Post('comments/:commentId/reactions')` addReaction method
   - Add `@UseGuards(AuthGuard)` decorator to `@Delete('comments/:commentId/reactions')` removeReaction method
   - Import UseGuards from @nestjs/common and AuthGuard from '../auth/auth.guard'
   - Update `src/comments/comments.module.ts` to import AuthModule to make AuthGuard available

3. In `src/blog/blog.module.ts`:
   - Ensure AuthModule is imported (it already imports AuthModule based on blog.controller using AuthService)

Note: GET endpoints (`findAll`, `findOne`, `findByPostId`, `getReactions`) should remain public for viewing.

Hide all write UI elements from anonymous users and add authentication token to write requests:

1. In `src/App.tsx`:
   - Modify the `PostList` rendering to only pass `onNewPost` prop when `user` is not null (conditionally show 'New Post' button only for logged-in users)
   - Change line ~153 from `onNewPost={() => setShowCreateForm(true)}` to `onNewPost={user ? () => setShowCreateForm(true) : undefined}`

2. In `src/components/PostDetail.tsx`:
   - Hide the 'Edit' button for anonymous users by wrapping it with `{user && ...}`
   - The Delete button is already conditionally shown for the post author only

3. In `src/components/CommentSection.tsx`:
   - Accept a new prop `user: User | null` to know if user is logged in
   - Hide the comment form (lines 244-272) when user is null: wrap with `{user && <form>...</form>}`
   - Hide the 'Delete' button on comments when user is null
   - Hide the 'React' button when user is null
   - Add Authorization header with token from localStorage to POST/DELETE requests for comments and reactions
   - Update the component's props interface to include `user`

4. In `src/App.tsx`:
   - Pass `user` prop to `PostDetail` component (already done)
   - `PostDetail` needs to pass `user` to `CommentSection`

5. In `src/components/PostDetail.tsx`:
   - Pass the `user` prop down to `<CommentSection postId={post.id} user={user} />`

example_backend: All write operations succeed with valid auth token
example_frontend: Anonymous user: 'New Post' button is NOT visible on the post list
Anonymous user: 'Edit' button is NOT visible on post detail
Anonymous user: Comment form is NOT visible
Anonymous user: 'Delete' button on comments is NOT visible
Anonymous user: 'React' button on comments is NOT visible
Anonymous user: Can view list of posts
Anonymous user: Can click into post detail and read full post
Anonymous user: Can see existing comments and reactions
Logged-in user: 'New Post' button IS visible
Logged-in user: 'Edit' button IS visible on post detail
Logged-in user: Comment form IS visible and functional
Logged-in user: Can add reactions to comments
Logged-in user: Can delete their own comments
